description: MCP servers for AgentSkin Suite — token optimization, browser automation, and agent tools. All servers auto-resolve via wrapper scripts or npx.

agentskin-mcp.description: AgentSkin SSS v5.0 — exposes fetch_optimized_data (URL→optimized skin, up to 88% token reduction with auto-classification for GitHub, npm, HackerNews, weather, etc.), skin_reasoning, classify_url, and strip_ansi.

tokenjuice-mcp.description: Tokenjuice v0.8.0 — exposes 5 tools: apply_json_semantic (JSON pruning), classify_url (URL rule matching), strip_ansi (5-pattern ANSI stripping), estimate_tokens (grapheme-aware token estimation), reduce (full pipeline on command output).

agentskin-shrunk.description: [SHRUNK] AgentSkin v5.0 via caveman-shrink — same 4 tools with compressed descriptions. Use when tool catalog size matters.

tokenjuice-shrunk.description: [SHRUNK] Tokenjuice v0.8.0 via caveman-shrink — same 5 tools with compressed descriptions. Use when tool catalog size matters.

chrome-devtools.description: Chrome DevTools MCP — browser automation via CDP. Navigate pages, take screenshots, click elements, evaluate JS, test web apps. Requires Chromium/Chrome running with --remote-debugging-port=9222.
